title: Paired Board Navigation
description: Trips slowplay, overpair defense, correct fold on double-paired
coreRule: Paired board — ranges сильно changed. Trips = slowplay rarely. Overpair = bluff catcher. Double-paired = fold everything kроме boats/trips.

decisions.description: BTN open 2.5x, BB called. Flop 9-9-3. BB donks 70% (4bb). Hero AA. Action?

explanation.call: ✓ AA bluff catcher на paired. BB range polarized (9x/boat/bluff).
explanation.raise: Some raise freq — thin value vs air.
explanation.fold: Too weak — AA beats most of donk range.
explanation.default: Overpair vs paired donk = call, re-evaluate turn.

decisions.description: BTN open, BB called. Flop K-K-2. Hero trips (bad kicker). BB checks. Action?

explanation.check: ✓ Slowplay trips — BB range has very few Kx or pairs. Let them bluff.
explanation.bet: Thin value — but checks preferred на dry paired.
explanation.default: Trips на dry paired = check. Range protect.

decisions.description: CO open, BB called. Flop 8-8-3. Hero QJ air. Action?

explanation.bet: ✓ Paired board cbet frequently с IP range advantage. Small 33%.
explanation.check: Some check freq — trap with overpairs.
explanation.default: Dry paired IP heads-up = small cbet range.

decisions.description: BTN open, BB called. Flop J-7-7 cbet called. Turn J = double-paired. BB leads 10bb. Hero AK high. Action?

explanation.fold: ✓ Double-paired board + BB lead = boats/trips. A-high = 0 equity.

decisions.description: Flop 6-6-8, cbet called. Turn 7 (straight possible 9Tx, 45x). Hero trips + nut kicker. BB checks. Action?

explanation.bet: ✓ Trips top kicker + straight draw card = bet for value + protection.
explanation.default: Trips top kicker on wet turn = large bet.

decisions.description: BTN open, BB called. Flop 7-7-4. Hero TT. BB checks. Action?

explanation.bet: ✓ TT overpair paired low = small cbet range. Value from weak pairs.
explanation.default: Overpair paired low = small cbet, rarely slowplay.
